before: int f(Item* a, int n){ int x=0; for(int i=0;i<n;i++){ x+=a[i].count; } return x; }
after: int f(Item* items, int itemCount){ int totalCount = 0; for (int index = 0; index < itemCount; ++index) { totalCount += items[index].count; } return totalCount; }
why_safe: Only parameter and local variable names changed; behavior and return value identical.

before: static bool c(const User* u){ return u!=nullptr && u->isActive() && !u->isBlocked(); }
after: static bool canUserProceed(const User* user){ return user != nullptr && user->isActive() && !user->isBlocked(); }
why_safe: Static helper and parameter renamed for clarity; boolean expression unchanged.
